sub_fields.label: Row Container Width
sub_fields.name: container_width
sub_fields.instructions: This controls the width of the div.container for this row. If necessary, adjust the pixel values of the options in the theme's CSS. Responsive left & right padding defaults to 5%.

sub_fields.label: Include L/R padding?
sub_fields.name: include_lr_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Turn this setting off if you want the container to be "full-width".

sub_fields.name: tag_type
sub_fields.instructions: By default, <section> tags are used for this module. If the module's content lacks any heading tags, you should use <aside> or <div> instead.

sub_fields.message: We'll include a visual reference point for this module:

Since you've selected the "Featured" blog layout, the first blog you select in the field below will be considered the featured blog. If no blogs are selected, the featured blog used on the blog page will be used here.

The featured layout will also only use the first 3 blogs selected in order to maintain its layout.

sub_fields.message: We'll include a visual reference point for this module:
This module displays Gallery posts in one of 5 layout options: Cards, Carousel, Featured, Full-Width, & Masonry

sub_fields.label: Gallery Selection: Manual or Automatic
sub_fields.name: manual_selection_or_automatic
sub_fields.instructions: Choose either to have the module automatically display the 6 most recently published Projects, or to manually select which Projects you'd like to display

sub_fields.label: Gallery List
sub_fields.name: gallery_list
sub_fields.instructions: Only displays if the Manual Selection or Automatic field is selected. Max of 6

sub_fields.label: Gallery Post Object
sub_fields.name: gallery_post_object
sub_fields.instructions: This field will have every Published Project post available to select.

sub_fields.label: Featured Manual Selection or Automatic
sub_fields.name: featured_manual_selection_or_automatic
sub_fields.instructions: Choose either to have the module automatically display the most recently published Project, or to manually select which Project you'd like to display

sub_fields.label: Featured Custom Excerpt
sub_fields.name: featured_custom_excerpt
sub_fields.instructions: This is an optional field. If nothing is entered here, it will pull in the excerpt from the featured project. If something is entered here, it will be displayed instead of the featured project's excerpt.

sub_fields.label: Era Title
sub_fields.name: era_title
sub_fields.instructions: This should be set to the main time period the items below took place in. This is what get's displayed on the page. So for example, if you wanted to display timeline events from the 1980s, I would set this title to be 1980s, 80s, etc. Then for the individual items, I would provide a year for the title (1981, 1984, etc.).
